# WaveformGenerator

**Inherits:** `RefCounted`

Meta Quest 3 / Android only â€” uses WaveformGenerator plugin singleton (ffmpeg/ffprobe via ffmpeg-kit). Do not use OS.execute/ffprobe on Android; all paths go through the plugin.
